title: asperella californica
intro: Asperella californica, also known as California earthstar, is a type of fungus that belongs to the genus Aspergillus. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential natural antifungal agent. The health benefits of Asperella californica include its potential to aid in the treatment of various infections and its ability to promote a healthy gut microbiome. Asperella californica can be prepared for medicinal use in various forms, including herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
